build_git_dataset: build a pandas DataFrame from a Git repository with commit diffs in markdown format
build_git_diff_markdown: build a markdown table from a Git diff index showing file changes and types
extract_commit_info: extract commit hash, author, email, date, and message from a Git commit object
run_git_dataset_cli: run the CLI tool to build a Git dataset and optionally save it as a parquet file
new_api_agentreq: build a Git dataset DataFrame from an AgentReq object with a configurable repo path
